laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.DeleteEffectContent: Also delete the Piloting Rig active effect from this actor?
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.EditWhilePilotingContent:
Warning: Changes made to the character may be lost when they stop piloting their rig.

We strongly suggest you cancel this edit, stop piloting the rig, and then make any changes.

If you want to make changes to the rig itself, these can be done by adding changes to the “Piloting Rig” effect in the effects tab. Changes added to the “Piloting Rig” effect will only be applied when piloting the rig.

You may dismiss this warning by clicking “Continue editing” below.
